Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x3FFB "STUNTCARRACER-3FFB" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Stunt Car Racer.prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out the JSR $425D at $4055 to remove a checksum routine and allow the game to start more quickly.
